name: Sunshine Biopharma Inc.
business: We are a pharmaceutical company offering and researching life-saving medicines in a wide variety of therapeutic areas, including oncology and antivirals. We have two wholly owned subsidiaries: (i) Nora Pharma Inc., through which we currently have 71 generic prescription drugs on the market in Canada, and (ii) Sunshine Biopharma Canada Inc., which develops and sells OTC supplements. In addition, we are conducting a proprietary drug development program which is comprised of (i) K1.1 mRNA, an LNP encapsulated mRNA targeted for liver cancer, and (ii) SBFM-PL4, a protease inhibitor for treatment of SARS Coronavirus infections.
sellsTo: Canada (provinces Quebec, Ontario, Alberta, British Columbia) - retail pharmacies, pharmacy channels, distributors, wholesalers

exposures.sentence: In addition, we are conducting a proprietary drug development program which is comprised of (i) K1.1 mRNA, an LNP encapsulated mRNA targeted for liver cancer, and (ii) SBFM-PL4, a protease inhibitor for treatment of SARS Coronavirus infections.
Our OTC products are sold in Canada exclusively through the Amazon marketplace, and until the third quarter of 2025, were also sold in the United States exclusively through the Amazon marketplace.
We have two wholly owned subsidiaries: (i) Nora Pharma Inc., through which we currently have 71 generic prescription drugs on the market in Canada.

catalysts.event: Received Notice of Allowance from USPTO for PCT patent application covering Coronavirus protease inhibitors.
catalysts.sentence: On December 23, 2025, we received a Notice of Allowance from the USPTO for our PCT patent application.

catalysts.event: Received trademark registration from USPTO for Sunshine Biopharma Inc. and Design.
catalysts.sentence: On September 30, 2025, we received official trademark registration from the United States Patent and Trademark Office (Registration No. 7,963,385) for Sunshine Biopharma Inc. and Design.

catalysts.event: Received Canadian trademark registrations for Sunshine Biopharma Inc. and Design.
catalysts.sentence: On November 10, 2025, we received confirmation of from the Canadian Intellectual Property Office of Canadian trademark registration (Registration No. TMA1,056,964 and TMA1,056,969) for Sunshine Biopharma Inc. and Design.

catalysts.event: Anticipated launch of 12 additional generic drugs during the remainder of 2026.
catalysts.sentence: We have 22 additional drugs in our pipeline including 12 we anticipate launching during the remainder of 2026.

catalysts.event: Implemented initiatives to reduce general and administrative expenses in January 2026.
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we implemented initiatives to reduce our general and administrative expenses and better align our cost structure with the Company’s objective of achieving profitability in the near term.

tamClaims.claim: Canadian generic pharmaceuticals market valued at approximately $10.4 billion USD in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: According to IMARC Group, the Canadian generic pharmaceuticals market was valued at approximately $10.4 billion USD in 2024 and is expected to grow to $19.7 billion USD by 2033.

tamClaims.claim: Canadian generic pharmaceuticals market expected to grow to $19.7 billion USD by 2033.
tamClaims.sentence: According to IMARC Group, the Canadian generic pharmaceuticals market was valued at approximately $10.4 billion USD in 2024 and is expected to grow to $19.7 billion USD by 2033.

tamClaims.claim: Canadian $10.4 billion a year generic drugs market (IMARC Group).
tamClaims.sentence: We believe the addition of these products to our existing portfolio will strengthen our presence in the Canadian $10.4 billion a year generic drugs market (IMARC Group).
